data.title: As a developer, I can verify the entire test suite is SIGPIPE-safe
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Run final validation across all 126 test files to confirm zero remaining patterns and full suite passes
**Why**: Confirms the epic success criteria are fully met before merge
**Scope**:
- IN: Full test suite validation, pattern count verification, CI verification
- OUT: Individual file fixes (handled by batch stories)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, grep -rn 'echo.*|.*grep -q' tests/ | wc -l returns 0
  ← Satisfies: "Zero echo ... | grep -q patterns remain in tests/"
- When this story is complete, bash tests/run-all.sh passes with zero failures
  ← Satisfies: "Full test suite passes after replacement"
- When this story is complete, CI pipeline passes on main after merge
  ← Satisfies: "No new SIGPIPE (exit 141) failures in CI after merge"
